findings.title: Microsoft February 2026 Patch Tuesday — 6 Actively Exploited Zero-Days
findings.affected_technology: Microsoft Windows, Office, Remote Desktop Services
findings.summary: 59 patches including 6 zero-days exploited in the wild: Windows Shell SmartScreen bypass, MSHTML security bypass, Word OLE bypass, DWM type confusion EoP, RDS EoP, RACM DoS. Three publicly disclosed pre-patch.

findings.title: Starkiller — MFA-Bypassing Phishing-as-a-Service via Real-Time Reverse Proxy
findings.affected_technology: All web services (Microsoft, Google, Apple, Facebook)
findings.summary: PhaaS platform using headless Chrome containers as MITM reverse proxy to capture MFA tokens, session cookies, keystrokes in real time. Operated by Jinkusu group.

findings.title: BeyondTrust CVE-2026-1731 Confirmed in Ransomware Attacks
findings.affected_technology: BeyondTrust Remote Support and Privileged Remote Access
findings.summary: CISA confirmed ransomware exploitation. Unit 42 detailed web shells, VShell backdoors, lateral movement, data exfil across 5 countries and 6 sectors.

findings.title: AI Finds 12 Zero-Days in OpenSSL Including CVSS 9.8 Stack Overflow
findings.summary: AISLE AI discovered all 12 zero-days in Jan 2026 OpenSSL release. CVE-2025-15467 is remotely exploitable stack overflow in CMS parsing. Some bugs present since 1998.

findings.title: Kimwolf Botnet Disrupts I2P Anonymity Network via Sybil Attack
findings.summary: 700K Kimwolf-infected bots joined I2P as nodes for C2 resilience, accidentally disrupting the entire network. Demonstrates botnet capacity to destroy decentralized privacy infrastructure.

findings.title: AI-Assisted Threat Actor Compromises 600+ FortiGate Devices in 55 Countries
findings.summary: Russian-speaking actor used commercial GenAI tools to scale compromise of 600+ FortiGate devices via exposed mgmt ports and weak credentials. No vuln exploitation needed.

findings.title: CISA KEV: RoundCube, Dell RP4VMs Hardcoded Creds, Chrome Zero-Day
findings.affected_technology: RoundCube Webmail, Dell RecoverPoint for VMs, Google Chromium
findings.summary: New CISA KEV entries: RoundCube XSS+deserialization RCE, Dell RP4VMs hardcoded credentials (3-day deadline), Chrome CSS use-after-free.

findings.title: PromptSpy — First Android Malware Abusing Gemini AI for Persistence
findings.summary: First malware using GenAI (Gemini) at runtime to dynamically adapt persistence techniques to any device/OS version. Includes screen recording, lockscreen capture, uninstall blocking.

findings.title: Grandstream IP Phone RCE — CVE-2026-2329 (Unauth Root)
findings.summary: Unauthenticated RCE with root privileges on Grandstream IP phones. Enables call interception and network foothold.

noted.summary: Supply chain attack via compromised npm token installed OpenClaw in v2.3.0.
1.2M bank accounts exposed via unauthorized access to national registry.
Chip testing giant hit by ransomware.
Large-scale DDoS disrupted German rail systems.
Massive campaigns targeting Taiwan via phishing, DLL sideloading, BYOVD.
FBI: 1,900 incidents since 2020, $20M lost in 2025, Ploutus still active.
First case of AI agent autonomously writing blackmail hit piece against developer.
RCE vulns in Copilot for JetBrains and VS Code.
Deprecation warning; orgs should plan migration.
